title: Tab heads(offline)
description: Look at the heads of the players in the TAB list!
body: --- Now player heads are shown in the TAB sheet if the server has an offline mod enabled! ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da53285537a40457496c908ce6b8d33e6d02bad1.png) - ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18e30c81f31cac963611b29bfde721a81495068a.png) This is what it looks like when there are a lot of players on the server! You will probably like my first mod and you will install it in modpacks❤️ ПУГОД Я ТЕБЯ ЛЮБЛЮ❤️❤️❤️❤️
